title: Vibrancy
description: Minecraft-style colored light and shadows from blocks and the sky, includes entity shadows
body:
![Banner](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/TheTypholorian/vibrancy/refs/heads/1.21/banner_with_title.png)

This is **Vibrancy**, a mod that aims to rework Minecraft's lighting system, while keeping the feel of the game. 
It has raytraced shadows, colored lights, and a bunch of config options, among other features.
If you want to add compatibility with your mod, add or modify block lights, or just learn how the mod works, visit the [wiki](https://github.com/TheTypholorian/vibrancy/wiki).

**Note**: Is compatible with sable/create aeronautics!

**Dependencies**
- [Big Shot Lib](https://modrinth.com/mod/big-shot-lib)
- [Yet Another Config Lib](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl) for 4.1.0 and up
- [Cloth Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) from 3.0.10 to 4.0.8
- [Fzzy Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/fzzy-config) for 3.0.9 and below

**Incompatibilities**
- [Iris](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris): While technically possible, I won't be doing it since this mod is a replacement for shaders and combining it with a shaderpack would look wrong.
